'''βàön-s-zh-h''' ('''kanaszhehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lib|lib]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-zh-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lib|lib]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàön-s-zh-h
|-
! Lemma
| kanaszhehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinaszhehoko|thinaszhehoko]] || [[word:jinaszhehoko|jinaszhehoko]] || [[word:shinaszhehoko|shinaszhehoko]] || [[word:kinaszhehoko|kinaszhehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonaszhehoko|thonaszhehoko]] || [[word:jonaszhehoko|jonaszhehoko]] || [[word:shonaszhehoko|shonaszhehoko]] || [[word:konaszhehoko|konaszhehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠnaszhehoko|thΟΠnaszhehoko]] || [[word:jΟΠnaszhehoko|jΟΠnaszhehoko]] || [[word:shΟΠnaszhehoko|shΟΠnaszhehoko]] || [[word:kΟΠnaszhehoko|kΟΠnaszhehoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanaszhehoko|thanaszhehoko]] || [[word:janaszhehoko|janaszhehoko]] || [[word:shanaszhehoko|shanaszhehoko]] || [[word:kanaszhehoko|kanaszhehoko]]

|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
